title: Preserve Group 21 status: G21-10: no-double-counting guardrails
description: Result: duplicate scalar tail, duplicate A-tail, and extra source-load ledger witnesses were recorded. Status: SUMMARY. Consequence: source cancellation ledgers do not count as sector neutrality. Handoff: each non-A pocket must be empty, diagnostic, non-metric, role-level, or theorem-routed.
